params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination (1-based).

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results per page.

params.name: tier
params.description: Filter members by loyalty tier name.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by member status.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of members belonging to the specified community. Results can be filtered by tier, status, or join date and are sorted by points balance or join date by default.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

items.docs: Registers a new member in the specified community. The member is associated with an external user identifier from the brand's platform. An optional referral code can be provided to credit the referrer.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the community member.

items.docs: Returns the profile and engagement data for a specific member, including their point balance, tier, referral code, and challenge completion history.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the community member.

items.docs: Updates profile fields or status for an existing community member. Supports partial updates — only the fields provided in the request body are modified.

info.name: Harbor Award points to a member

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the community member.

items.docs: Awards a specified number of points to a community member. Used for custom point events outside of standard challenges, such as purchase rewards, anniversary bonuses, or manual adjustments. A description is required to explain the reason for the award.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by challenge status.

items.docs: Returns all challenges configured for the community, including their point values, completion criteria, and active status. Challenges can be one-time or repeatable and cover actions like following social accounts, making purchases, or attending events.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

items.docs: Creates a new challenge for community members to complete and earn points. Challenges can be one-time or repeatable, can have optional verification requirements, and support various completion action types.

info.name: Harbor Mark a challenge as completed by a member

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: challengeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the challenge.

items.docs: Records that a specific member has completed the given challenge and awards the configured points to that member. If the challenge requires verification, proof must be provided. Idempotent for one-time challenges — duplicate completion requests are ignored.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by reward availability status.

items.docs: Returns the rewards catalog for the community, including reward names, point costs, availability status, and redemption limits. Members can redeem rewards using their earned points.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination (1-based).

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results per page.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by redemption status.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of reward redemption requests from community members. Can be filtered by status (pending, approved, fulfilled, rejected) for fulfillment workflow management.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

items.docs: Submits a redemption request on behalf of a member for a specific reward from the catalog. Deducts the reward's point cost from the member's balance if they have sufficient points.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results per page.

params.name: period
params.description: Time period for leaderboard calculation.

items.docs: Returns the ranked leaderboard of community members sorted by total points earned. Supports optional time-window filtering for weekly or monthly leaderboards.

params.name: communityId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Harbor community.

items.docs: Returns configuration and metadata for the specified community, including name, branding settings, tier structure, and active feature flags.
